tools.Name: MLX-VLM
tools.Description: A package for inference and fine-tuning of Vision Language Models (VLMs) and Omni Models (with audio/video) locally on Mac hardware.
tools.Use_Case: Running multimodal AI (vision, audio, text) directly on Apple Silicon with hardware acceleration.

tools.Name: Onyx
tools.Description: An open-source AI platform serving as an application layer for LLMs with advanced capabilities like RAG, web search, code execution, and deep research.
tools.Use_Case: Deploying a full-featured, self-hosted AI agentic interface that supports multiple LLM backends and enterprise-grade features.

tools.Name: RAG-Anything
tools.Description: An all-in-one multimodal RAG system capable of processing text, images, tables, equations, and diverse file formats seamlessly.
tools.Use_Case: Extracting information and building knowledge bases from complex documents that contain non-textual elements like charts and formulas.
